title: trifolium alpestre
intro: Trifolium alpestre, also known as alpine clover or mountain clover, is a perennial plant species belonging to the legume family Fabaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and acting as an antimicrobial agent. Trifolium alpestre is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to promote overall health and well-being.
